programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend¡¯s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Rudraksh
programme.desc: Bhuria (Sunil Shetty) a contract labourer finds a sacred Rudraksh, possessed by Raavan, the demon king and thereby acquires supernatural powers. He tries to establish his rule over the universe but is stopped by Varun (Sanjay Dutt), a yogic and a gifted healer. In his mission, Varun is supported by his father Pandit Ved Pujan (Kabir Bedi) and researcher Dr. Gayathri (Bipasha Basu).

programme.title: Saamy
programme.desc: A policeman accepts bribes from corrupt politicians and local thugs to help them in their illegal work. However, he decides to correct his mistakes after he falls in love with a woman.

programme.title: Ghaatak Returns
programme.desc: Gautham doesn't believe in flirting but his friend Kannan is a compulsive flirt. Gautham finally falls in love with Sandhya, Kannan's cousin and the girl Kannan's parents want him to marry.

programme.title: Derailed
programme.desc: Four teenagers running away from home get more than they bargained for when they lure a man to a motel to rob him.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Extreme Survivors
programme.desc: Wildlife must adapt to New Zealand's changing landscape. Local fauna have evolved in an unstable environment.

programme.title: A Very Strange Parrot
programme.desc: Most parrots are colorful and fly in noisy flocks, but New Zealand's kakapo breaks all the rules.

programme.title: Island Giants
programme.desc: Many of New Zealand's native animals share an unusual trait they're living giants. Researchers find out why.

programme.title: Violent Seas
programme.desc: Take a dive beneath the waves in search of the mysterious creatures of New Zealand's oceans.

programme.title: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it shows no sign of losing popularity with animals and people.

programme.title: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is a land full of wildlife, from proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Born To Be Wild (AKA Pride of the West)
programme.desc: A greedy land baron has shut down the dam that supplies water to the town of Indian Head. Two truck drivers race to get a truck loaded with dynamite to the dam so they can blow it, but must battle their way through a gang of armed thugs hired by the land baron to stop them.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: Mr Wong In Chinatown
programme.desc: A pretty Chinese woman, seeking help from San Francisco detective James Lee Wong, is killed by a poisoned dart in his front hall, having time only to scrawl "Captain J" on a sheet of paper. She proves to be Princess Lin Hwa.

programme.title: The Kid
programme.desc: On the streets of downtown Los Angeles, a woman and a young boy fight to protect something both highly valuable and extremely dangerous.

programme.title: La Signora Senza Camelie
programme.desc: A new starlet is discovered and has ups and downs in Italian films.

programme.title: American Refugee
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old France Hoang must choose between staying home to support his family or honoring his adoptive country by accepting an admission to West Point and joining the US military.

programme.title: MASTIII DOUBLES
programme.desc: The theme of the show is to exhibits dual work of an artist. It could be an Actor, Actress, vocalist, lyricist, or composer. It's a non-stop 120 minutes of a euphonious evening with 2 hits of each artist played back to back.

programme.title: JUST MOHABBAT
programme.desc: If you wish to cherish love at first sight, the butterfly moments, and the feeling when he or she said yes to for the first time, just snuggle up and tune in. We promise to refresh such moments every evening with us.

programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid

programme.desc: After a successful hunt., Adrian Knopps' hunting partner disappears taking their bear out to the boat. Now Adrian finds himself stranded on a tidal flat surround by bears and wolf packs and with massive storm bearing down on him. How will he survive?

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain
programme.desc: Dr Jack meets extreme risk taker Matthew Adams. Will tests at the University of Cambridge show that Matthew has a different brain from non-risk taking Jack?

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain
programme.desc: Dr Jack meets a man who has defied all odds by miraculously recovering from severe brain damage, after a car crash left him lying in a coma for three months.

programme.title: Past, Present, Future
programme.desc: From the first written word to the Internet, we've continued to innovate how we communicate with each other. What happens when technology advances to the point that ideas and thoughts can be shared instantly?

programme.title: Past, Present, Future
programme.desc: From empires to major metropolitan cities, transportation has been crucial. As cities grow more congested and overwhelmed with toxic air, how will future transportation help get us where we need to be?

programme.title: Past, Present, Future
programme.desc: While psychedelics were originally seen as a tool for spiritual enlightenment and healing, new research and studies are revisiting psychedelics to reveal their potential clinical and therapeutic impact.

programme.title: Past, Present, Future
programme.desc: We use music to nurture our children, comfort the sick, and worship the unseen. Music is inherently a human act, but today, artificial intelligence and algorithms have gotten more and more involved in music production, distribution, and marketing.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Steve Spangler reveals the secrets of color, with amazing experiments you can do at home. He'll show you how to create clouds of color with rainbow powders. Plus, what ink manufacturers don't want you to know about how they create colors.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Here are amazing projects – based on science – that you can build yourself, all with things you can buy at a hardware store. Host Steve Spangler shows how to create your own t-shirt launcher. Plus, discover the substance that makes jelly slide.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Fill a glass with water and make the water disappear! How to do it? Well, the secret is inside a product that's on the shelves of your supermarket. Host Steve Spangler roams the supermarket for things you can use to create your own science magic.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Host Steve Spangler shows how every day can be a spooky day with scary tricks and magic effects all based on science. Stage your own zombie party, complete with eerie, smoking beverages supernatural bubbles and fake blood.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Steve Spangler reveals the secrets to science tricks and stunts that will amaze your friends. They're all some of his favorite experiments – like explosive bubbles you can hold in your hand and freezing water with your mind!

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans
programme.desc: Thom Hunt heads to Las Vegas to meet Tim Cridland, a sideshow performer who claims to be pain-proof.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans

programme.title: Frontier Vets

programme.title: Frontier Vets

programme.title: Orgosolo Old Town Sardinia Italy
programme.desc: Situated in the middle of the Mediterranean Sea, Sardinia is an autonomous region in southwestern Italy, with a vast history and a charming natural environment. Unaffected by human settlement, its small villages and ancient cities still preserve their nat"&"ural composition. Orgosolo is one of them. It sits in a valley at the center of the rugged Supramonte mountains range, surrounded by a fascinating and charming natural landscape dominated by wild and unpolluted nature. The small village's territory is cha"&"racterized by an unparalleled environmental richness with uncontaminated woods, Mediterranean scrub, widespread endemics, and a varied fauna ranging from birds to reptiles.

programme.title: Antalya, Turkey
programme.desc: When King Attalos first set eyes on Antalya he called it “Paradise on Earth”. Its fertile soil and natural harbour made it favourable for settlers throughout the ages. Therefore Antalya has a rich cultural heritage with many remains of an outstanding hist"&"ory. The Persians, Alexander the Great, the Romans, the Arabs and many more have left their mark on the area over the centuries but no one more than King Attalos of Pergamon who in 159 B.C. gave the region its name Attaleia, which leaded to the modern nam"&"e Antalya....

programme.title: Penang area, Malaysia
programme.desc: Penang's Malaysian state's main constituent island is a region with a unique blend of Malay, Chinese, Indian and British cultures and traditions, with a vibrant history. Overflowing with charming historic buildings and ornate religious sites, the island r"&"esembles a magnificent city from the past entirely. Located at the Ayer Itam suburbs foot in George Town, also called Penang, and the leading port of Malaysia, Kek Lok Si temple is known as the jewel in Malaysia's crown of heritage temples. The temple com"&"plex expands from the very temple, which is considered one of the largest and finest temple complexes in Southeast Asia. The complex grows over approximately 30 acres donated by Yeoh Siew Beow, who became the temple's first abbot.

programme.sub-title: Haskell Free Library - Palace of Gold - African-American Heritage Museum - Smog Museum

programme.desc: Will meets Mr. Pierogi, Ms. Pasczki and the polka-loving Pierorgettes at Pierogi Fest in Whiting, Indiana ducks for cover at Lambert's Café in Alabama discovers where the bullets are buried in Tombstone Arizona's Bird Cage theater is shocked by the products made from endangered animals confiscated by the National Wildlife Property Repository near Denver and cheers on the daring (and possibly deranged) participants at a Unicycle Football game in San Marcos, Texas.
